30. ADOPTION SANS CONSENT.
Should the 5th House contain Saturn un-aspected by others and fall in a Sapthamsa owned by
Mars, the native will adopt a grown up child without the consent of its natural parents.
31-32. BASE CHILDREN.
If the 5th House contains the Sun and falls in the divisions of Saturn receiving the aspect of Mars,
the children so obtained will be abject. Should the Moon be in the 5th House and receive
exclusively Saturns aspect, while the 5th House falls in a Navansa of Mars, even then the
progeny will be foolish and base.
33. If the 5th House is occupied by Mars falling in many of Saturns divisions and be in aspect to
the Sun, one will obtain a son, that is adopted by a stranger after its being cast off by its
original parents, so says sage Karuna.
34. ISSUE BY A REMARRIED WIDOW.
127
